1271.bio: A seal dated to names Konstantinos Skleros, protospatharios krites of the hippodrone and Moglena . A seal dated to names Konstantinos Skleros, magistros and vestes .

3116.bio: According to Salazar y Castro, he was the son of Pedro Núñez de Aza , but this has not been verified. m ---.

6318.bio: The Historia Leone Bardæ Armenii filio ( Scriptor Incertus ) names Leonem Scleri cognominatum who was expelled from the palace by Emperor Mikhael I (in) and installed as Peloponnesiaci tractus ducem . 1.
